Argument Reference

The following arguments are supported:

  • display_name - (Required) (Updatable) The name for this delegation control.
  • delegation_subscription_ids - (Required) (Updatable) The delegation subscriptions allowed to raise delegated access requests.
  • resource_ids - (Required) (Updatable) The resource OCIDs governed by this delegation control.
  • notification_topic_id - (Required) (Updatable) The OCI Notifications topic used for delegation control messages.
  • notification_message_format - (Required) (Updatable) The notification message format for this delegation control.
  • description - (Optional) (Updatable) Optional description for this delegation control.
  • num_approvals_required - (Optional) (Updatable) The number of approvals required for each delegated access request.
  • pre_approved_service_provider_action_names - (Optional) (Updatable) The pre-approved service provider action names for this delegation control.
  • is_auto_approve_during_maintenance - (Optional) (Updatable) Whether delegated access requests are auto-approved during maintenance.
  • freeform_tags - (Optional) (Updatable) Free-form tags for this resource.
  • defined_tags - (Optional) (Updatable) Defined tags for this resource.
  • compartment_id - (Required) Updating this field after creation is not supported.
  • resource_type - (Required) Updating this field after creation is not supported.
  • vault_id - (Optional) Updating this value after creation is not supported.
  • vault_key_id - (Optional) Updating this value after creation is not supported.
